sections.paragraph:
αὐθάδης, ες (s. αὐθάδεια; Aeschyl., Hdt.+; Polyb. 4, 21; Plut., Lycurg. 11, 6, Lucull. 7, 2; PAmh 78, 13f; Sb 4284, 9; Gen 49:3, 7; Pr 21:24; Jos., Ant. 1, 189; 4, 263; TKellis 22, 27) self-willed, stubborn, arrogant Tit 1:7; 2 Pt 2:10; 1 Cl 1:1 (w. προπετής); Hs 5, 4, 2; 5, 5, 1; 9, 22, 1; D 3:6. Field, Notes, 219; to the Gk. mind=hybris, s. Reader, Polemo 296.—DELG and Frisk. M-M. TW. Spicq.

Aeschyl Aeschyl , V b.c.—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

Polyb Polyb , III–II b.c.—List 5

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

PAmh PAmh = The Amherst Papyri I–II—List 4

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

Hs Hs = Similitudes

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

Field, Notes Field, Notes = Notes on the Translation of the NT

Gk. Gk. = Greek

Reader, Polemo Reader, Polemo , s. Polemo—List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

Frisk Frisk = HF., Griechisches etymologisches Wörterbuch—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Spicq Spicq = CS., Lexique théologique du Nouveau Testament—Lists 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 150
